title: Verify Injection mitigation
steps: Set up test environment for Input handlers
Monitor for security violations or unauthorized actions
Verify that preventive controls block the attack
expected_result: The system should either prevent the Injection attack or detect and log it appropriately. No unauthorized access should be granted.

title: Verify Broken Access Control mitigation
steps: Set up test environment for Authorization layer
Attempt to exploit broken access control
Monitor for security violations or unauthorized actions
Verify that preventive controls block the attack
expected_result: The system should either prevent the Broken Access Control attack or detect and log it appropriately. No unauthorized access should be granted.

title: Verify Identification and Authentication Failures mitigation
steps: Set up test environment for Authentication
Attempt to exploit identification and authentication failures
Monitor for security violations or unauthorized actions
Verify that preventive controls block the attack
expected_result: The system should either prevent the Identification and Authentication Failures attack or detect and log it appropriately. No unauthorized access should be granted.
